TOUMI Lyazid
TOUMI Lyazid
Grade:Professeur
Grade:Professeur
Email:lyazid.toumi@univ-setif.dz
Email:lyazid.toumi@univ-setif.dz
Département:Informatique
Bureau:72 Departement Informatique
Bureau:72 Departement Informatique

Lyazid TOUMI is an Associate Professor at College
of Sciences - University Ferhat Abbas Setif-1
(UFAS-1), where he joined as a faculty member since Jan. 2016. He's member of the Bio-Computing Team in The Intelligents Systems
Lab. Prior to that, he spent six years as Assistant Professor at College of Sciences. He was a Visiting Researcher at
Department of Computer Science
,
Central Michigan University, USA. He is also involved in Master Programmes in Computer Sciences. Dr. Lyazid TOUMI has been actively involved in the research community by serving as reviewer for technical journals (The journal of supercomputing (IF: 1.532), Knowledge-Based Systems journal (IF: 4.396))
Dr. Lyazid TOUMI is a former deputy head of Computer Sciences Department (Teaching) from Sep. 2015 to June 2023, member of the Research Committee (Computer Sciences Departement) since Sep. 2016, member of the Research Committee on Committees (College of Sciences) since Sep. 2013.
Dr. Lyazid TOUMI is member of the regional conference of eastern universities since May 2023
Research Area
Database Physical Design
Very Large Database Design
Big Data & Cloud
Database Deployment
Optimization and machine learning
